message:
test(frankenterm-core): wire charset translation into conformance fixture harness

Update the conformance fixture test harness to handle charset-related
actions that were previously no-ops:

- DesignateCharset: wire slot/charset to cursor.designate_charset()
- SingleShift2/3: set cursor.single_shift for SS2/SS3 overrides
- apply_print: translate characters through effective_charset() before
  writing to grid, and consume single-shift state after each print

This enables the conformance harness to correctly verify DEC Special
Graphics line-drawing output against fixture expectations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
